content: Phase 1: Research Claude usage endpoint contract (DONE)
Phase 2A: Generate Swift Xcode scaffold (40 Swift files + docs + scripts + license)
Phase 2B: Build FastAPI backend (zip serving, waitlist, stats, feedback endpoints)
Phase 2C: Build React landing page (hero, notch demo, mascot, sections, accordion, waitlist)
Phase 2D: Install frontend dependencies (framer-motion) + restart services + lint clean
Phase 2F: Fix any bugs found, then finish
